allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const pool = require\('./config/db'\); setTimeout\(async \(\) => { try { const [rows] = await pool.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM users'\); console.log\('Users:', rows[0].cnt\); const [posts] = await pool.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM posts'\); console.log\('Posts:', posts[0].cnt\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); } finally { process.exit\(0\); } }, 2000\);")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "Server UP: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server DOWN: $_" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Posts count: {len\(d\)}'\); print\('First post keys:', list\(d[0].keys\(\)\)[:8] if d else 'none'\)")
